---
id: wallet-native-payment
title: "Native Payment API (Wallet)"
description: "Allows merchants to charge a customer's wallet balance directly via server-to-server integration. The wallet service is identified by `instrument_type=wallet` in the checkout transaction."
sidebar_label: "Native Payment API (Wallet)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Native Payment API (Wallet)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/payment/wallet/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Allows merchants to charge a customer's wallet balance directly via server-to-server integration. The wallet service is identified by `instrument_type=wallet` in the checkout transaction. 

The payment is processed using the customer's wallet account linked to the transaction's `customer_id`. No additional payload is required from the customer — the wallet service handles the debit internally.

<pre style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://ksa.ottu.dev/b/pbl/v2/payment/wallet/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"payload\": {},\n  \"pg_code\": \"string\",\n  \"session_id\": \"string\"\n}'"}</pre>

  as={"h2"}

>

</Heading>
